title: Shrink Your Food Waste – Protect Nature Challenge - Canada.ca
content:
## Shrink Your Food Waste – Protect Nature Challenge
When food is wasted, all the resources used to produce it are also wasted. By reducing food loss and waste, we can also reduce our greenhouse gas emissions.
Everyone has a role to play in reducing food loss and waste, including businesses, consumers and governments. Check out the Commission for Environmental Cooperation’s Food Matters Action Kit for information, inspiration and fun activities to help you shrink your household food waste.

## Let’s do this together
Share these challenges with your friends and family and show us what you are doing by tagging us in your social media messages and by using the hashtag #ProtectNature.
We’re on Instagram @canenvironment , Facebook @EnvironmentandClimateChange and Twitter @environmentca .
Check out our list of challenges to help protect nature.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
